feature_findings.finding: Pages manufactured static municipal answers and procedure/domain fixtures.
feature_findings.resolution: Static bridge deleted; unconfigured approved calls return bounded 503.
Default changed to planned /api/public/v1/query; production 404 gate retained until gateway exists.

feature_findings.finding: Browser could be tempted to receive an integration credential.
feature_findings.resolution: Explicit public gateway/BFF boundary; no credential forwarding or frontend secret.

feature_findings.finding: UI claimed verified/official loaded documents without runtime evidence.
feature_findings.resolution: Claims removed; evidence labels depend on actual responses.

feature_findings.finding: Marketing sections obscured the usable product.
feature_findings.resolution: Hero plus installation only; direct Assistant and Glass Wall menu.

feature_findings.finding: Glass surfaces risked insufficient text contrast.
feature_findings.resolution: Opaque surfaces and measured token ratios above 4.5:1.

feature_findings.finding: Unconfigured widget assumed script origin was a valid API.
feature_findings.resolution: Explicit data-api-url is required outside the Pages bridge.

feature_findings.finding: Cloud choice could trigger premature resource creation or cost.
feature_findings.resolution: GCP architecture selected; no project, billing, Terraform or apply.

feature_findings.finding: External SEO/OCR/design references could become unreviewed runtime dependencies.
feature_findings.resolution: SEO deferred, OCR evaluation isolated, original DESIGN.md created.

open_findings.finding: POST /api/public/v1/query is not implemented; public assistant remains disabled.
No authorized durable corpus bytes or real ingestion exist.
No runner has executed the staging lifecycle and twenty API/system journeys.
No approved IdP/BFF/session or authenticated role-aware UI exists.
OS Electoral and Content Agency have not executed consumer suites.
GCP is architecture only; infrastructure, observability, load/HA, recovery, privacy, merge and deployment are absent.
